title: Cooke & Miller Silicone Liner. Reusable Liner for Ninja, Salter, Rectangle Air Fryers
features: Compatible with Dual Air Fryers - Air fryer liners measure 20cm x 12cm x 7cm - compatible with all double basket air fryers including the Ninja Foodi air fryer and Salter Dual Air Fryer.

Reusable and Value for Money - Air fryer liner made from food-safe grade silicone, can withstand temperatures up to 392°F/200°C, will not crack or distort in extreme temperatures - long-lasting. Replacement for other air fryer pans or single-use parchment paper.
100% Non Stick - Distinctive raised texture design keeps grease away from food for improved air circulation and even heat distribution.
Widely used - Suitable not only for use in an air fryer but also microwave, oven, steamer, and cooker. Can be applied for baking, roasting, frying, or holding food.
Easy to Clean & Dishwasher Safe - Our air fryer silicone liners are soft and flexible, just flip it inside out and wash with warm water. Hand wash and dishwasher safe.
description: Cooke & Miller Silicone Air Fryer Liner. Reusable Air Fryer Silicone Liner for Dual Air Fryers including Ninja & Salter Dual
